::: {.callout-important title="We do not store your data"}
**This is not an online form. Nothing you type is submitted to the website or stored by the BNR Information Hub.**  
:::

::: {.callout-note title="How to complete this agreement"}
To use this form, complete all fields, then print or save the page as a PDF for signature and submission.
:::

## 1. Purpose of this agreement

This agreement allows an approved researcher or research team to access **restricted, de-identified data** from the Barbados National Registry for Chronic Non-Communicable Disease (BNR).

It supports the use of data for public health and academic research while ensuring compliance with the **Barbados Data Protection Act (2019)** and BNR’s duty of confidentiality.

## 2. Parties

**Data Custodian:**  
The Barbados National Registry for Chronic Non-Communicable Disease (BNR)  
George Alleyne Chronic Disease Research Centre  
The University of the West Indies, Cave Hill Campus  

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Data User / Researcher</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="data-user-name" class="form-label">Name</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="data-user-name" placeholder="Full name">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="data-user-institution" class="form-label">Institution</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="data-user-institution" placeholder="Institution or organisation">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="data-user-address" class="form-label">Address</label>
      <textarea class="form-control" id="data-user-address" rows="3" placeholder="Institutional address"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="data-user-email" class="form-label">Email</label>
      <input type="email" class="form-control" id="data-user-email" placeholder="name@example.org">
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

## 3. Description of data

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Data requested</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <p class="mb-2"><strong>Type of data</strong></p>
    <p>Restricted, de-identified dataset</p>

    <p class="mb-2"><strong>Disease area(s)</strong></p>

    <div class="form-check">
      <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="disease-heart-attack">
      <label class="form-check-label" for="disease-heart-attack">Heart attack</label>
    </div>

    <div class="form-check">
      <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="disease-stroke">
      <label class="form-check-label" for="disease-stroke">Stroke</label>
    </div>

    <div class="form-check mb-3">
      <input class="form-check-input" type="checkbox" id="disease-cancer">
      <label class="form-check-label" for="disease-cancer">Cancer</label>
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="period-covered" class="form-label">Period covered</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="period-covered" placeholder="For example: 2019–2023">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="data-format" class="form-label">Format</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="data-format" placeholder="For example: CSV, Stata, Excel">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="version-released" class="form-label">Version / date released</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="version-released" placeholder="Dataset version and release date">
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

All direct identifiers, including names, addresses, and ID numbers, have been removed.

Although the data are de-identified, users must handle them with care to prevent any risk of re-identification.

## 4. Agreed purpose

The data are supplied **only for the approved research project** listed below.

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Approved research project</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="project-title" class="form-label">Project title</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="project-title" placeholder="Full project title">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="project-description" class="form-label">Brief description</label>
      <textarea class="form-control" id="project-description" rows="4" placeholder="Briefly describe the purpose of the research and planned analysis"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="ethics-reference" class="form-label">Ethics approval reference, if applicable</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="ethics-reference" placeholder="Ethics committee reference or approval number">
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

The data may also be used for **closely related analyses, peer-review, or follow-up publications** linked to this project, provided that the BNR is notified.

## 5. Conditions of use

The Researcher agrees to:

1. Keep the data secure and limit access to authorised project team members.
2. Not attempt to identify individuals or link BNR data to other datasets without BNR approval.
3. Use the data only for research that has ethical or institutional approval.
4. Not share the data with anyone outside the approved research team.
5. Retain the data only while the research, analysis, and related publications are active, then either archive them securely within the institution or delete them under institutional policy.
6. Acknowledge the BNR and the Ministry of Health and Wellness in all outputs.
7. Share with the BNR a copy or citation of any reports or publications arising from this work.
8. Report any suspected data breach or misuse immediately to the BNR Technical Lead.

## 6. Data retention and security

The Researcher agrees that the data will be stored and managed as follows:

- Store data on secure, password-protected and encrypted institutional systems.
- Institutional or cloud storage is acceptable if compliant with recognised standards, such as ISO 27001 or equivalent.
- Do not store data on personal laptops or unencrypted media.
- Data may be archived for reproducibility and verification within the research institution, under the same or higher level of security.

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Secure storage location</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="storage-location" class="form-label">Where will the data be stored?</label>
      <textarea class="form-control" id="storage-location" rows="3" placeholder="Describe the approved storage location, system, or institutional environment"></textarea>
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="access-list" class="form-label">Who will have access?</label>
      <textarea class="form-control" id="access-list" rows="3" placeholder="List authorised project team members or roles"></textarea>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

## 7. Governance and oversight

All data sharing is subject to:

- approval by the **BNR Technical Lead**, and
- ethical approval by a recognised Research Ethics Committee, if required.

The BNR may withdraw access if these terms are breached or if continuing use no longer meets the public interest test under the **Barbados Data Protection Act (2019)**.

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>BNR review and approval</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="bnr-review-status" class="form-label">BNR review status</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="bnr-review-status" placeholder="For example: approved, approved with conditions, not approved">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="bnr-conditions" class="form-label">Conditions of approval, if any</label>
      <textarea class="form-control" id="bnr-conditions" rows="3" placeholder="List any conditions attached to this data release"></textarea>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

## 8. Signatures

### For the Barbados National Registry

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Data Custodian approval</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="custodian-name" class="form-label">Name</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="custodian-name">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="custodian-title" class="form-label">Title</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="custodian-title">
    </div>

    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-8 mb-3">
        <label for="custodian-signature" class="form-label">Signature</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="custodian-signature">
      </div>

      <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
        <label for="custodian-date" class="form-label">Date</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="custodian-date" placeholder="DD Month YYYY">
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

### For the Researcher

```{=html}
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <strong>Data User agreement</strong>
  </div>

  <div class="card-body">

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="researcher-name-signature" class="form-label">Name</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="researcher-name-signature">
    </div>

    <div class="mb-3">
      <label for="researcher-institution-signature" class="form-label">Institution</label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="researcher-institution-signature">
    </div>

    <div class="row">
      <div class="col-md-8 mb-3">
        <label for="researcher-signature" class="form-label">Signature</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="researcher-signature">
      </div>

      <div class="col-md-4 mb-3">
        <label for="researcher-date" class="form-label">Date</label>
        <input type="text" class="form-control" id="researcher-date" placeholder="DD Month YYYY">
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

_Last updated: May 2026_
